tr.title: Blog | Qualy
tr.description: Qualy hakkinda guncellemeler, kullanici hikayeleri ve urun notlari.

en.title: Blog | Qualy
en.description: Updates, product notes, and customer stories from Qualy.

posts.title: How we stabilized response quality with ready replies and a knowledge base
posts.excerpt: A practical look at how ready replies, knowledge base documents, and follow-up rules helped us keep customer answers more consistent.
posts.seoTitle: Ready replies and knowledge base response quality | Qualy
posts.seoDescription: Learn how Qualy combines ready replies, knowledge base documents, and follow-up rules to keep customer responses more consistent.
posts.contentHtml:
Why we set this up

As the product grew, the same customer question could receive different quality depending on who answered it. We reduced that drift by combining ready replies, knowledge base documents, and follow-up rules in one response layer.

What changed?

  • We grouped recurring questions into reusable ready replies.
  • We moved service, pricing, and process details into a structured knowledge base.
  • We let the AI ask short follow-up questions when key context was missing.

What improved?

  • The first answer now goes out faster.
  • Teams stay closer to the same tone.
  • Human takeover is easier to spot when the conversation needs it.

You can continue with features and pricing for more context.

posts.title: Hazir yanitlar ve bilgi tabani ile cevap kalitesini nasil sabitledik
posts.excerpt: Hazir yanitlar, bilgi tabani dokumanlari ve net takip kurallari ile daha tutarli musteri cevaplarini nasil elde ettigimizi anlatiyoruz.
posts.seoTitle: Hazir yanitlar ve bilgi tabani ile cevap kalitesi | Qualy
posts.seoDescription: Hazir yanitlar, bilgi tabani ve takip akislari ile daha tutarli musteri cevaplari olusturmanin pratik yolunu inceleyin.
posts.contentHtml:
Neden bu akisi kurduk?

Qualy'de buyume hizlandikca ayni musteri sorusu farkli kisilerden farkli kalitede cevap almaya basladi. Bunu azaltmak icin hazir yanitlari, bilgi tabani dokumanlarini ve takip kurallarini tek bir cevap katmaninda birlestirdik.

Neyi degistirdik?

  • Sik gelen sorular icin hazir yanitlari tek yerde topladik.
  • Hizmet, fiyatlama ve surec detaylarini bilgi tabani dokumanlarina tasidik.
  • AI'nin eksik bilgi gordugu noktalarda kisa takip sorulari sormasini sagladik.

Sonuc ne oldu?

  • Ilk yanit daha hizli cikmaya basladi.
  • Ekipler ayni dilde kaldi.
  • Insan devralmasi gerektiren gorusmeler daha net ayristi.

Daha fazla baglam icin ozellikler ve fiyatlandirma sayfalarina bakabilirsiniz.

posts.title: How we launched the Qualy blog without hurting performance
posts.excerpt: A quick look at the static routing, technical SEO, and internal linking decisions behind the Qualy blog launch.
posts.seoTitle: Launching the Qualy blog without hurting performance
posts.seoDescription: See how the Qualy blog launch used static routes, technical SEO, and internal links to support growth.
posts.contentHtml:
Launch notes

We launched the Qualy blog on top of the existing landing page architecture instead of adding a separate app.

What changed?

  • Blog index and post pages are generated as static routes.
  • SEO metadata is generated per article during the build.
  • Internal links now point to landing pages and related blog entries.

You can continue with pricing or browse the English blog feed.

posts.title: Qualy blog'u yayina alirken neleri optimize ettik
posts.excerpt: Qualy blog'unu hiz, teknik SEO ve dogru ic link yapisiyla nasil yayina aldigimizi ozetliyoruz.
posts.seoDescription: Qualy blog'unun performans, teknik SEO ve ic link kurgusunu nasil kurdugumuzu inceleyin.
posts.contentHtml:
Blog yayin notlari

Qualy blog'unu, landing page ile ayni statik mimariyi koruyarak yayinladik.

Neleri duzelttik?

  • Blog index ve detay sayfalari artik statik olarak uretiliyor.
  • Teknik SEO alanlari her yazi icin build sirasinda yaziliyor.
  • Ic linkler landing page ve diger blog yazilarina dogrudan baglaniyor.

Daha fazla detay icin fiyatlandirma sayfasina ve blog arsivi sayfasina bakabilirsiniz.
